identity.name: Cohere Health
identity.description: Cohere Health provides AI-powered clinical intelligence solutions that transform prior authorization processes into comprehensive care journey management for health plans and providers.

team.ceo_background: Co-founder and CEO since 2019, previously founding partner of SCIO Health Analytics serving Fortune 500 healthcare organizations. Holds MS in Computer Science from University of Pittsburgh and MBA from University of Michigan.

competitive.market_position: Market leader in AI-powered prior authorization

direct_competitors.name: Anterior
direct_competitors.differentiator: Focuses on expediting health insurance approvals with AI at $95M valuation

direct_competitors.name: Adjudicator
direct_competitors.differentiator: AI-powered system for analyzing medical policies and optimizing PA letters

direct_competitors.name: Humata Health
direct_competitors.differentiator: Comprehensive prior authorization solution for both providers and payers

direct_competitors.name: Banjo Health
direct_competitors.differentiator: Clinician-designed end-to-end platform for medical and pharmacy PA management

direct_competitors.name: EthermedAI
direct_competitors.differentiator: Intelligent automation focused on minimizing manual processes without additional apps

tailwinds: Growing demand for healthcare AI automation
Regulatory push for faster prior authorization
Rising administrative costs driving efficiency needs

news.summary: Strong momentum with record 2025 growth following $90M Series C funding led by Temasek. Company achieved 94% provider satisfaction, expanded client base with ten new deals including CMS contracts, and gained recognition from major industry analysts including Gartner and KLAS. Leadership recognition with CEO named EY Entrepreneur of the Year reflects successful execution of clinical intelligence strategy.

recent_events.event: $90M Series C funding led by Temasek to scale AI platform and expand clinical use cases
CEO Siva Namasivayam named EY Entrepreneur of the Year 2025 New England Award winner
Partnership with Microsoft Dragon Copilot for ambient listening prior authorization
Announced record 2025 growth with ten new deals and 94% provider satisfaction

moat_signals: Clinical-grade AI with responsible AI-first approach

fit_score.rationale: Exceptional fit with strong Healthcare sector alignment, profitable scale at $184M revenue, and demonstrated market leadership in clinical intelligence. Company shows clear PE characteristics with mature revenue base, proven business model, and defensive market position processing 12M+ annual requests. Recent $90M Series C suggests approaching later-stage valuations but still within addressable range for the right strategic buyer.

confidence.note: Strong financial data from entity card and comprehensive recent funding coverage, though limited team leadership details beyond CEO profile.
